x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery data is the authoritative source of CI truth for Now Assist ITOM. Stale discovery means Now Assist AI is reasoning over outdated infrastructure, producing unreliable impact analysis and alert correlation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure a recurring discovery schedule to run at minimum weekly via discovery_schedule_list.do. Investigate MID Server health if discovery is failing. Stale discovery means Now Assist ITOM is reasoning over outdated infrastructure data.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851caa
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Discovery data is the authoritative source of CI truth for Now Assist ITOM. Stale discovery means Now Assist AI is reasoning over outdated infrastructure, producing unreliable impact analysis and alert correlation.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Last Successful Discovery Run</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Probe sys_choice for the backend value of the Completed state
    var discCompletedValue = "";
    try {
        var choiceGR = new GlideRecord("sys_choice");
        choiceGR.addQuery("name", "discovery_status");
        choiceGR.addQuery("element", "state");
        choiceGR.addQuery("label", "CONTAINS", "omplet");
        choiceGR.setLimit(1);
        choiceGR.query();
        if (choiceGR.next()) { discCompletedValue = choiceGR.getValue("value") || ""; }
    } catch(e) {}

    var testGr = new GlideRecord("discovery_status");
    testGr.setLimit(1);
    testGr.query();
    if (!testGr.isValid()) {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "discovery_status table not found",
            finding: "Discovery plugin may not be installed on this instance. Now Assist ITOM has no infrastructure data to reason over." };
    }

    var gr = new GlideRecord("discovery_status");
    if (discCompletedValue !== "") {
        gr.addQuery("state", discCompletedValue);
    } else {
        gr.addQuery("state", "IN", "Complete,Completed");
    }
    gr.orderByDesc("sys_updated_on");
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    if (!gr.next()) {
        // Fallback: surface most recent run of any state
        var anyGR = new GlideRecord("discovery_status");
        anyGR.orderByDesc("sys_updated_on");
        anyGR.setLimit(1);
        anyGR.query();
        if (anyGR.next()) {
            var anyState = anyGR.getDisplayValue("state");
            var anyDate  = anyGR.getDisplayValue("sys_updated_on");
            return { status: "not_ready",
                actualValue: "No completed discovery runs found. Most recent run state: " + anyState + " (" + anyDate + ")",
                finding: "No completed discovery runs found. Check if runs are completing or stuck in Active/Starting state via discovery_status_list.do." };
        }
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No discovery runs found",
            finding: "No discovery runs found. Discovery must be configured and run before Now Assist ITOM AI capabilities can function." };
    }

    var lastRun = new GlideDateTime(gr.getValue("sys_updated_on"));
    var now = new GlideDateTime();
    var days = Math.floor((now.getNumericValue() - lastRun.getNumericValue()) / 86400000);
    var actualValue = "Last completed discovery: " + days + " days ago (" + gr.getDisplayValue("sys_updated_on") + ")";

    if (days <= 7) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Discovery completed " + days + " day(s) ago. Now Assist ITOM is reasoning over current infrastructure data." };
    } else if (days <= 30) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Last discovery was " + days + " days ago (target: within 7 days). Now Assist ITOM may be reasoning over stale infrastructure data." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: "Last discovery was " + days + " days ago. Stale infrastructure data significantly degrades Now Assist ITOM AI impact analysis and alert correlation accuracy." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000355</number><order>10</order><remediation_guidance>Configure a recurring discovery schedule to run at minimum weekly via discovery_schedule_list.do. Investigate MID Server health if discovery is failing. Stale discovery means Now Assist ITOM is reasoning over outdated infrastructure data.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>72f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851caa</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Last Successful Discovery Run</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851caa</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
